seoTitle: Santa Ana Unified Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Santa Ana Unified 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 28 last instruction day, Thanksgiving recess, winter break, spring recess, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Santa Ana Unified starts instruction on August 11, 2025 and lists May 28, 2026 as the last day of instruction. Students attend 180 days, while the calendar lists 187 teacher duty days. The PDF includes grade-span notes for elementary, intermediate, high school, and educational options, including parent conference windows and modified days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Santa Ana Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Santa Ana Unified starts instruction on Monday, August 11, 2025. The first day of service for staff is August 6, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SAUSD Spring Recess in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Santa Ana Unified in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of instruction is Thursday, May 28, 2026. The last day of service is Friday, May 29, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are on the SAUSD 2025-2026 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The official 2025-2026 academic calendar lists 180 student instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists 180 student instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Recess
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Recess is listed for April 6-10, 2026.
